habitat: Mexico and southwestern US dry scrub.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional Mexican leaf tea as mild tonic and reputed aphrodisiac; modern herbal specialty.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditioneller mexikanischer Blättertee als mildes Tonikum; modern spezialisiertes Kraut.
preparation: Dried leaf tea or smoking blends historically (not recommended to smoke).
cautions: Limited clinical data. Pregnancy: avoid. Prefer tea over smoking.
historicalNotes: Documented in Mexican herbalism and 19th-century US Eclectic texts.
